tasks.title: CLI entrypoint, argv parser, output abstraction
tasks.notes: Implemented parse.ts, output.ts, run.ts, index.ts, types.ts. Build and lint clean.

tasks.title: Foundation tests
tasks.notes: cli-parse.test.ts (12 tests), cli-run.test.ts (6 tests). Full suite green.

tasks.title: Implement and test --version
tasks.notes: --version/-v prints fleet-e2e-toy v1.0.0, --version --json prints JSON variant.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 2
tasks.notes: Phase 2 verified on temp-requirements branch. CHANGES NEEDED from feedback.md applied to unrelated branch.

tasks.title: Temp-file registry + a real JSON-capable subcommand
tasks.notes: Created src/cli/tempfiles.ts (register/cleanupAll/list). Updated run.ts with write subcommand. Added tests/cli-tempfiles.test.ts (4 tests) and tests/cli-json.test.ts (4 tests). 51 tests pass, build and lint clean.

tasks.title: SIGINT graceful shutdown (testable handler + shim wiring)
tasks.notes: Created src/cli/signals.ts with createSigintHandler factory (injectable deps). Updated src/cli/index.ts shim to register SIGINT handler using cleanupAll and process.stderr. Added tests/cli-signals.test.ts (4 tests). 55 tests pass, build and lint clean.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 3
tasks.notes: Phase 3 verification complete: npm run build clean, npm run lint clean, npm test 55/55 passed across 8 suites. --json accepted on write subcommand with valid JSON output; error JSON on stdout with non-zero exit; text-mode error on stderr; SIGINT handler (4 tests) calls cleanupâ†’writeâ†’exit(130); temp-file registry (4 tests) register/list/cleanup/best-effort delete; both OutputWriter.error() branches covered (text stderr + JSON stdout).
